about.title: About
paragraphs: To build a reliable digital product that truly moves the business forward, good code alone isn’t enough. My job is to align four pillars that reinforce each other: the software foundation, the data and AI that make it smarter, the people who build it, and the way the organization operates to ship with quality.

When those four pieces are designed together, the benefits are clear: faster, data-informed decisions; teams aligned to execute with less friction; and a platform that scales without becoming fragile.
Rather than optimizing one area in isolation, I aim for balance—sustainable velocity, consistent quality, and a product that’s easier to evolve.

software.title: Software
body: Architecture and infrastructure that support growth: scalability, resilience, and predictable operations.
Quality as a system: testing, observability, traceability, and documentation to reduce risk and technical debt.
Impact: fewer incidents, safer changes, and a platform that evolves without becoming fragile.

dataAI.title: Data & AI
body: Trusted data end to end: collection, cleaning, and metrics tied to KPIs/OKRs.
Applied AI (ML/LLMs/agents) focused on usefulness: automation, assistance, and better decisions.
Impact: less uncertainty, faster learning loops, and continuous product optimization.

people.title: People
body: Empathetic technical leadership: clarity, feedback, and mentoring to raise the bar without burnout.
Ownership culture: autonomy with accountability, collaboration, and direct communication.
Impact: better alignment, stronger execution, and consistent decisions under pressure.

process.title: Organizations & Processes
body: Operational efficiency without bureaucracy: lightweight processes that remove friction and speed up delivery.
Useful rituals and metrics (not vanity): focus, prioritization, and continuous improvement.
Impact: predictability, sustainable speed, and consistent quality over time.

data-analyst.summary: Turned data into decisions and delivered dashboards that improved customer outcomes.
bullets: Process optimization: created a standardized framework that reduced setup and implementation time by 40%.
Customer impact: improved satisfaction by 25% through interactive, customer-focused dashboards for 20+ clients.
Innovation: co-developed asset-tracking algorithms involving geolocation and triangulation.

full-stack-developer.summary: Built and scaled MEAN applications, partnering with stakeholders to turn product goals into reliable systems.
bullets: Led technical implementation of product initiatives and translated requirements into delivery plans.
Designed and developed scalable applications using Angular, Node.js, and MongoDB.
Built APIs and backend services for business-critical workflows; improved performance and code quality.
Collaborated with distributed teams in agile environments, contributing to architecture and product decisions.

tech-lead.summary: Kept business, technology, and people aligned—bridging strategy and execution to ship production-ready AI solutions.
bullets: Strategic direction: led the technological roadmap, transitioning experimental AI/LLM implementations into production-ready solutions.
Architecture: designed and oversaw systems using Node.js, Python, and MongoDB, ensuring performance and stability.
Mentorship: acted as a hands-on mentor, promoting design patterns and clean code to simplify complex integrations.
Systems thinking: implemented scalable architectures that adapt to evolving organizational needs.
